scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,hub,rush -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:hub" "npm run dev:rush-run"
scripts.dev:hub: concurrently -n hub-vite,electron -c cyan,yellow "vite --config apps/hub/vite.config.js --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5174" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5174 && electron apps/hub"
scripts.preview: npm run mongo:up && wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:27017 && concurrently -n api,web,rush -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run preview:api" "npm run preview:web" "npm run preview:rush-run"
scripts.preview:api: cross-env PORT=3100 MONGO_URI=mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/nexus_arcade_preview API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 OAUTH_ISSUER=http://127.0.0.1:3100 node apps/api/src/server.js
scripts.preview:hub: cross-env API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 RUSH_RUN_WEB_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5175 concurrently -n hub-vite,electron -c cyan,yellow "vite --config apps/hub/vite.config.js --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5174" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5174 && electron apps/hub"
scripts.mongo:test:up: cross-env MONGO_PORT=27018 docker compose -p nexus-arcade-test up -d mongo
scripts.mongo:test:down: cross-env MONGO_PORT=27018 docker compose -p nexus-arcade-test down
scripts.test: node --test packages/shared/tests/*.test.js apps/api/src/tests/*.test.js apps/web/src/*.test.js apps/hub/src/tests/*.test.js apps/rush-run/src/*.test.js
scripts.test:integration:docker: npm run mongo:test:up && wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:27018 && cross-env MONGO_URI=mongodb://127.0.0.1:27018/nexus_arcade_test node --test apps/api/src/integration-tests/*.test.js
scripts.build: node --check apps/api/src/server.js && vite build --config apps/web/vite.config.js && vite build --config apps/hub/vite.config.js && vite build --config apps/rush-run/vite.config.js && node --check apps/hub/src/main/main.js
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build
scripts.verify:docker: npm run test:integration:docker && npm run verify
